summary: Iteration 3 (VYRO home screen) tested end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass — /today contract, no _id leakage, 404 on unknown profile, session seeding (5-day history, statuses in {workout,rest,missed}), streak logic (workout+rest active, missed breaks), nutrition targets echo payload. Frontend: /home?profileId=<valid> renders home-root with every required testID (home-greeting, home-workout + name/exercises/duration/start, home-nutrition + cal-consumed/target/remaining + protein/carbs/fat, home-history with 5 history-row-<date> entries, home-streak+home-streak-value since streak=5). home-empty renders when no profileId + empty AsyncStorage and its Start onboarding button routes to welcome-root. home-error renders on invalid profileId (shows HTTP 404 + Retry). home-workout-start navigates to /workout/today with correct params. StreakBadge <3 hidden path verified via code review (StreakBadge.tsx L23 returns null). Minor non-blocking: Inter font files fail to decode in Expo web preview (OTS parsing error, glyph fallback works). Require-cycle warning src/components/index.ts <-> OptionCard.tsx.

issues: Inter font files return HTML instead of TTF from /assets/?unstable_path=... — 'OTS parsing error: invalid sfntVersion' repeated for every weight. UI falls back to system font; typography intent is degraded on web preview. Native builds unaffected but worth verifying assets/fonts route.

react_native_issues.issue: Require cycle: src/components/index.ts -> src/components/OptionCard.tsx -> src/components/index.ts. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/OptionCard.tsx

action_items: Optional: silence require-cycle warning by importing from concrete sibling files instead of the barrel index in OptionCard.tsx.
Optional: investigate why /assets/?unstable_path=./assets/fonts/Inter-*.ttf serves non-TTF content in the web preview (Expo web asset route). Not blocking iteration 3.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:165 workout_days = sorted(rnd.sample(all_slots, k=min(target, len(all_slots)) - 1 if target > 1 else 1)) — for training_days=1 seeds exactly 1 workout day; for training_days>=2 seeds min(target,5)-1 workout days. This is an off-by-one relative to the doc-string ('mostly workouts on training days'). Not a spec violation but worth confirming intent.
home.tsx greeting is hard-coded to 'Morning, <name>.' regardless of local hour. Consider time-of-day aware greeting later.
StreakBadge correctly returns null for days<3 (verified by inspection). Handled cleanly.
seed_data_creation: Created two TEST_-prefixed profiles via POST /api/profiles (TEST_Alex Rivera, TEST_Session Seed, TEST_Frontend User). Each seeds 5 sessions in db.sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest lives at /app/backend/tests/test_vyro_today.py — run with EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL set. Frontend home flow validated by pointing browser at /home?profileId=<id from POST /api/profiles>. Streak<3 path only reachable via code review or by manually inserting a session with status='missed' at today-1 in db.sessions.
